description: Configure the current user's profile and preferences in SuiteCRM while logged in as the admin user. Update the profile details to include Title: 'Customer Service Representative', Department: 'Global Support', and Office Phone: '(555) 019-9283'. Set the regional preferences for Date Format to '2010-12-23' (Y-m-d) and Time Format to '23:00' (24-hour). Additionally, create an email signature named 'Support Standard' that includes the text 'Customer Service Representative' and 'Global Support', and incorporates the image located at /home/ga/Documents/support_logo.png. Save all changes to the user profile and signature.
